description: Release gate thresholds for KV quantization reports. Only metrics present in a report are evaluated by scripts/kvquant/compare.py.

relative_delta_pct.description: Quantized perplexity increase vs unquantized baseline.

ratio.description: Candidate PPL must be within 1% of the fp16 baseline in either direction.

exact_match_agreement_rate.description: Quantized exact-match rate must agree with the fp16 baseline.

contains_agreement_rate.description: Quantized contains-rate must agree with the fp16 baseline.

pass_agreement_rate.description: Quantized pass/fail must agree with the fp16 baseline.

json_valid_agreement_rate.description: Quantized JSON validity must agree with the fp16 baseline.

required_substrings_agreement_rate.description: Quantized required-substring check must agree with the fp16 baseline.

decode_tps_ratio.description: Quantized decode tokens/sec divided by baseline tokens/sec.

peak_memory_ratio.description: Quantized peak memory divided by baseline peak memory.
